title: Prisma Cloud Remediation - AWS IAM User Policy Misconfiguration
content:
This playbook remediates the following Prisma Cloud AWS IAM User alerts.

Prisma Cloud policies remediated:

 - AWS IAM user has two active Access Keys

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (PrismaCloud, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — policyId: Prisma Cloud policy Id..

Integrations/scripts used: Print, aws-iam-list-access-keys-for-user, aws-iam-update-access-key.

      iscommand: true

      roleArn: {}
      roleSessionDuration: {}
      roleSessionName: {}

        complex:

          accessor: IAM.Users.AccessKeys.UserName

    nexttasks:

      "yes":

    conditions:
    - label: "yes"

                      iscontext: true
                    right:

                - - operator: isEqualString

                      iscontext: true
                    right:
                      value:

                accessor: brand
            iscontext: true
    view: |-
